headline: Cantor Raises Robinhood Target On Prediction-Markets Venture It Says Wall Street Hasn't Priced In

headline: Rothera: Robinhood’s Prediction Market Empire Is Quietly Taking Shape
summary: Robinhood Prediction Market:- Last year in November 2025, Robinhood announced a joint venture with Susquehanna International Group to build its own prediction market exchange. The move appeared to be an infrastructure investment rather than a major product launch. At the time, the company said it would build a CFTC-licensed exchange and clearinghouse dedicated to futures,

headline: Trump family got about $500M from crypto venture — but investors saw steep losses
summary: Eric Trump and Donald Trump Jr. celebrated a deal with Alt5 Sigma that generated roughly $500 million for the Trump family. The company's shares are down 93%.
